pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 50-76: TICKETS array with 5 hardcoded support ticket subjects, created in a for loop with exactly 5 iterations

privileged_info_summary: The task uses 5 synthetic IT support conversations created programmatically at setup time. The mailbox is named 'Technical Support' with the email address 'tech@helpdesk.local'. The target assignee is Marcus Chen with email 'm.chen@helpdesk.local'. The 5 conversations have the following subjects: 'VPN connection drops every 15 minutes on Windows 11', 'Cannot print to HP LaserJet on 4th floor after network upgrade', 'Outlook keeps asking for password after O365 migration', 'New laptop setup request for onboarding employee starting May 12', and 'Shared drive S: not mapping on login - Accounting department'. All data is hardcoded in setup_task.sh with no external data sources.
